steps.title: Identify the needed sides
steps.content: Relative to angle B, the opposite side is AC, with length $24$. The hypotenuse is AB, with length $40$. The sine ratio compares the opposite side to the hypotenuse.

steps.title: Apply the sine ratio
steps.content:
Substitute those side lengths into the sine ratio, then simplify by dividing numerator and denominator by $8$.
$\sin B=\frac{24}{40}=\frac{3}{5}$
The answer is A.
